subject: steel financial swap term sheet question

emails.subject: Steel Financial Swap Term Sheet Question
emails.subject_base: Steel Financial Swap Term Sheet Question
emails.body: Steel Financial Swap Term Sheet Question Mark, could you add a legal disclaimer to this draft term sheet that reflects the fact that we have not performed a credit check on the counterparty? Thanks. FYI, I am also going to prepare a draft term sheet for a physical transaction which I will ask Harry Collins to review. --Andrew Forwarded by Andrew Wilson/Corp/Enron on 10/26/2000 01:52 AM Andrew Wilson 10/23/2000 09:28 AM
